description: 前向兼容 ignoreUnknown(wire-protocol §A):平台给 dispatch 消息加了一个未来才有的未知字段(futureRoutingHint),已知 major(v1)的旧 SDK 必须照常接受并 dispatch、不因未知字段崩溃或拒收。schemaAccept:true 锁'未知字段不影响 accept';与 18(未知 major v3 → reject)正交——这条测的是已知 major + 未知字段。

then.sdkExpectedAction: accept and process (dispatch) a known-major (v1) message even though it carries an unknown forward-compat field; ignore the unknown field
sdkMustNot: reject or crash on an unknown field in a known-major message
fail to commit offset for an otherwise-valid message
